name: molecule-platform
description: Org-admin management MCP — exposes provision_workspace and the rest of the concierge management surface. Privileged: only the org concierge (kind=platform) loads it. Delivered as an mcpServers-shaped plugin resolved to the MCP server adaptor on any runtime (see mcp/mcp-plugin-delivery.contract.json).
author: Molecule AI

commands.name: /provision
commands.description: Provision a new workspace under this org (wraps the provision_workspace MCP tool).
